title: node:test, Supertest, Contracts, Properties, Fuzzing, and Fault Injection · Type Recall
summary: A delayed operations handoff reconstructs node:test, supertest, contracts, properties, fuzzing, and fault injection from bounded code and request evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the layered deterministic server verification matrix. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for layered deterministic server verification matrix after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use node:test suites, subtests, assertions, fixtures, hooks, concurrency, timers, and cleanup to prove domain decisions independently of Express.
Exercise Express handlers with Supertest using exact methods, paths, fields, bodies, identity, effects, errors, and cleanup without unnecessary public listeners.
Verify runtime requests and responses against schemas and consumer cases while detecting undocumented statuses, fields, nullability, security, and behavioral drift.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Fault Time Load Leak Gates
steps.instruction:
review case — A review team handles case 9963 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to gate release on layered domain, handler, fuzz, and resource-lifecycle evidence; keep rollback safe during a storage expansion; then replace an average latency claim with p95 and event-loop saturation evidence. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Inject aborts, timeouts, pool exhaustion, ambiguous commits, proxy faults, slow streams, clock shifts, load, and resource leaks with invariant and recovery gates.

Inspect the Fault Time Load Leak Gates trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Node and Express server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Fault Time Load Leak Gates.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for inject aborts, timeouts, pool exhaustion, ambiguous commits, proxy faults, slow streams, clock shifts, load, and resource leaks with invariant and recovery gates. For Node and Express server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Fault Time Load Leak Gates, keep Fault Time Load Leak Gates connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.
